query:
-- Insert Ministry Leadership Track bundle
INSERT INTO course_bundles (name, description, icon, colorTheme, displayOrder, isActive) 
VALUES (
  'Ministry Leadership Track',
  'Comprehensive training for ministry leaders combining fivefold ministry, leadership principles, and church administration',
  'Users',
  'blue',
  1,
  true
);

-- Insert Spiritual Warfare & Deliverance bundle

  'Spiritual Warfare & Deliverance',
  'Master spiritual warfare, deliverance ministry, and prophetic intercession for breakthrough ministry',
  'Shield',
  'red',
  2,
  true
);

-- Insert Biblical Foundations bundle

VALUES (
  'Biblical Foundations',
  'Build a solid foundation with Old Testament, New Testament surveys, and biblical hermeneutics',
  'Book',
  'green',
  3,
  true
);
